dimensions.label: Traction and Market Validation
dimensions.evidence: Live active users, retention, women-customer share, and business outcome.
dimensions.must_improve: Partner export must prove in-market usage and a 12-month trend.

dimensions.label: Harm Reduction and Trust Signal
dimensions.evidence: Event-level safeguards connect fraud, consent, complaints, and collections to outcomes.
dimensions.must_improve: Add partner baseline and post-rollout harm-reduction result.

dimensions.label: Use of Gender-Disaggregated Data
dimensions.evidence: GDD schema, women cohort metrics, design-change narrative, and trust report.
dimensions.must_improve: Replace sample data with validated partner GDD at scale.

dimensions.label: Regulatory and Compliance Evidence
dimensions.evidence: Privacy, consent, complaint mechanism, sanctions, KYC/AML, and market posture.
dimensions.must_improve: Partner counsel should approve jurisdiction-specific claims.

dimensions.label: Clarity and Coherence
dimensions.evidence: Application draft, form map, trust layer architecture, and Vue reporting cockpit.
dimensions.must_improve: Keep final answer names aligned to the partner legal entity.

rivals.name: Live fintech with native women-customer product
rivals.likely_strength: Real customers, stronger partner authority, authentic market traction.
rivals.weakness: May not prove trust instrumentation or GDD feedback loops.
rivals.counter: Lead with event-level trust layer plus partner live metrics.

rivals.name: Fraud or scam-prevention fintech
rivals.likely_strength: Clear harm-reduction claim and measurable loss reduction.
rivals.weakness: Often narrow to fraud, not women-specific trust, consent, complaints, and usage.
rivals.counter: Show full-journey trust, not only risk blocking.

rivals.name: Responsible-credit or collections platform
rivals.weakness: May be less differentiated on transparency, complaint recourse, and GDD.
rivals.counter: Tie affordability and collections safeguards to women retention and confidence.

rivals.name: Financial education or literacy product
rivals.likely_strength: Empathetic trust narrative and qualitative stories.
rivals.weakness: Harder to show direct financial-journey behavior and business impact.
rivals.counter: Prove trust at transaction, repayment, and issue-resolution moments.

kill_shots: Trust is measured as operational behavior, not described as brand sentiment.
The solution connects women-specific barriers to product changes, event evidence, and business outcomes.
GDD is used as a control loop: identify gap, change journey, measure outcome, escalate harm.
Partner data gates are explicit, which prevents overclaiming before final submission.

evidence_gaps.message: Applicant can bind the fintech to the official rules.
Solution is live with active customers.
Live partner metrics can replace synthetic sample data.
